Human Resources Executive at sudocodelab

🚀 **We’re Hiring: AI/ML Architect** 🚀

Are you passionate about designing scalable AI/ML solutions and leading cutting-edge innovation? We’re looking for an experienced **AI/ML Architect** to join our team and drive impactful data-driven strategies.

🔹 **Role:** AI/ML Architect
🔹 **Experience:** 8+ Years
🔹 **Location:** [Remote/Hybrid/Onsite – Specify Location]
🔹 **Employment Type:** [Full-time/Contract/Freelance]

### 🔍 **Key Responsibilities:**

* Design and architect end-to-end AI/ML solutions for business problems
* Lead model development, deployment, and optimization at scale
* Define ML pipelines, data strategies, and MLOps frameworks
* Collaborate with data engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders
* Evaluate and implement the latest AI technologies and frameworks
* Ensure scalability, performance, and security of ML systems

### 🧠 **Required Skills:**

* Strong expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and AI frameworks
* Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar tools
* Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP)
* Hands-on with MLOps, CI/CD pipelines, and model deployment
* Knowledge of big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop, etc.)
* Strong problem-solving and leadership skills

### ⭐ **Good to Have:**

* Experience with NLP, Computer Vision, or Generative AI
* Exposure to data engineering and ETL pipelines
* Familiarity with Kubernetes/Docker

💡 **Why Join Us?**

* Work on innovative AI-driven projects
* Collaborative and growth-oriented environment
* Opportunity to lead and shape AI strategy

📩 **Interested candidates can apply or share their profiles at: hr@sudocodelab.com
